sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n105276" key="trista/thros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τρι-στάτηρος</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ᾰ]</pron>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n105276.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">worth three staters,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">χλαμύς</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:6:165" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.165</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
